zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Rayner於1520年出生在英國肯特奧特爾登時，他的父親John Rymer20歲，母親Mary Woodward15歲。他於1547年9月21日與Elizabeth Tanner在英國英格蘭艾可懷特 諾特利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1590年在他的家鄉享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Rayner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from an inflected form of German rein or central Yiddish rayn ‘pure’.

variants.name: Renner
meanings: English, German, and Swiss German: from an agent derivative of Middle English, Middle High German rennen ‘to run’, hence an occupational name for a messenger, normally a mounted and armed military servant. This surname is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine).
English and German: variant of English   Rayner  , German   Reiner  .

variants.name: Raynor
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Rainer, Reiner, Renier (ancient Germanic Raginhari, from ragin ‘counsel’ + hari, heri ‘army’). The surname was later much confused with Reynold and Renard .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Rayner was born in 1520, in Otterden, Kent, England, his father, John Rymer, was 20 and his mother, Mary Woodward, was 15. He married Elizabeth Tanner on 21 September 1547, in White Notley, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1590, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Rayner est né en 1520, à Otterden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Rymer, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mary Woodward, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Tanner le 21 septembre 1547, à White Notley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1590, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Rayner è nato il nel 1520 nel Otterden, Kent, England, il suo padre, John Rymer, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Mary Woodward, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Tanner il 21 settembre 1547, nel White Notley, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1590, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Raynerが1520年にイギリスケントオッテルデンで生まれた時，父John Rymerは20歳，母Mary Woodwardは15歳であった。1547年9月21日にイギリスイギリスエセックスウィト ノトリーでElizabeth Tannerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1590年に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Rayner(이)가 1520년 영국 켄트 오터든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Rymer(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Woodward(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1547년 9월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 휘트 노틀리에서 Elizabeth Tanner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1590년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Rayner nasceu em 1520, em Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Rymer, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mary Woodward, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Tanner em 21 de setembro de 1547, em White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Rayner родился в 1520 г. в местности оттирден, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Rymer было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Woodward, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Tanner 21 сентября 1547 г. в местности уит нотли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1590 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.
